/usr/bin/ar qc libmakesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.a "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/GpioLines.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/DigitalInput.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/RotaryEncoder.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/DigitalInputs.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/DigitalInputFactory.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/DigitalOutput.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/GpioBandSelector.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/DigitalOutputs.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/DigitalOutputFactory.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/platform/linux/Gpiod.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/platform/linux/GpioEventQueueGpiod.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/platform/linux/DigitalInputLinesRequestGpiod.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.dir/src/platform/linux/DigitalOutputLinesRequestGpiod.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libmakesdr-settings-control-hal-gpio.a
